check_season.title: Check the current Serene Seasons season — note what crops are currently fertile

seasonal_farm.title: Plant a seasonal crop that is currently fertile according to Serene Seasons

subtitle.text: The world continued while you were gone. Seasons changed. Crops grew and died.

description: Serene Seasons adds four seasons to the Overworld.
Each season affects temperature, weather, and crop fertility.
Spring — most crops fertile, moderate temperature
Summer — heat-tolerant crops fertile, high temperature (Cold Sweat overlap)
Winter — most crops frozen, only cold-tolerant crops viable
You have been in the End.
Seasons do not apply in the End.
When you return, the season has changed without you.
This is the Frieren time-skip in mechanical form:
the world moved on while the adventure was happening.
Check what season you returned to.
